title: New Chunky Ribbed Cord Thermal Faux Fur Velvet Mink Throw Blanket Soft Warm Thick Bed Sofa Throw Double King (Charcoal Grey, Double - 150x200cm)
features: Luxuriously Soft & Thick Made from High Quality Polyester Suitable For Beds / Sofas / Anywhere in Home Dust Absorbent Beautifully crafted and stitched - Ideal as a seater sofa throw / bed blanket / bed runner/ bedspread.
Luxury chunky ribbed cord blanket gives you complete comfort and warmth - perfect for all year round. Snuggle up with our gorgeous and cuddly throws. Ideal gift for your loved ones.
Contemporary Designing with a corduroy ribbed cord pattern giving the ultimate luxury, comfort, warmth and modern finish to any room.
Washing instructions: Machine washable at 30°C - Do Not Tumble Dry - Do Not Bleach - Do Not Dry Clean - Do Not Iron
Colours: Beige - Black - Blush Pink - Charcoal - Cream - Green - Navy Blue - Ochre - Orange - Silver
description: Ideal as one-seater, two-seater and three-seater sofa throw, bed blanket, bed runner or as a bedspread. This chunky ribbed cord throw is thick, fluffy, cuddly, soft and furry faux fur throw can be the perfect accessory for any room in your home. Available in many colours to fit the ambient of your bedroom, this throw can fit a standard Single, Double, King or Super King size bed. The material is 100% polyester and is machine washable at 30°C.
